stories.title_zh: 年内退出134家，村镇银行改革持续加速
stories.title_en: 年内退出134家，村镇银行改革持续加速
stories.desc_zh: 2026年以来，国内村镇银行重组整合进程持续提速。统计显示，截至7月9日，今年已有134家村镇银行获批退出，机构总量缩减至1048家，延续2025年以来加快出清的态势。业内人士认为，县域金融生态正迎来重塑，精简村镇银行数量，将推动县域金融服务提质增效。（证券时报）
stories.desc_en: Since 2026, the restructuring and integration process of domestic village banks has continued to accelerate. Statistics show that as of July 9, 134 rural banks have been approved to withdraw this year, reducing the total number of institutions to 1,048, continuing the trend of accelerating clearance since 2025. Insiders believe that the county financial ecology is being reshaped and the number of village banks will be streamlined, which will promote the quality and efficiency of county financial services. (Securities Times)

stories.title_zh: 万勋科技发布“柔韧充”自动充电通用服务引擎，以“0.000s无极容差应变”首创混沌服务、全类通解！
stories.title_en: Wanxun Technology released the "Flexible Charging" automatic charging general service engine, with "0.000s infinite tolerance strain" to create the first chaos service and solve the whole class!
stories.desc_zh: 7月9日，万勋科技于北京举办自动充电机器人业务战略发布会，重磅推出行业首个以 “混沌服务” 模式全面覆盖公用、专用、家用所有应用类别的 “柔韧充” 自动充电通用服务引擎及其核心产品。其独一无二的 “0.000s 无极容差应变” 技术特性，在同期发布的三大类别 “全球首例” 应用成果中得到充分展现，正式为行业带来彻底击穿自动充电各场景规模商用核心困局的通用解法。 0.000S 无机容差应变 瞬息万变的混沌不确定性，为自动充电场景带来 “反应速度” 核心挑战  目前，自动充电演示和概念产品层出不穷，但距真正规模商用始终一步之遥。其核心原因在于，从精准控制的演示环节走向真实而复杂的落地应用时，这不再是一个 “把插头对准插座” 的简单表演，而是一个典型的高不确定性、低可控度的 “现实混沌” 场景作业 —— 室内室外、雨雪风霜、昼夜变换与灯光闪烁等，带来环境的混沌与不确定；成百上千的品牌、
stories.desc_en: On July 9, Wanxun Technology held a strategic conference on automatic charging robot business in Beijing, and launched the industry's first "flexible charging" automatic charging general service engine and its core products with a "chaotic service" model covering all application categories of public, private and home use. Its unique "0.000s infinite tolerance strain" technical characteristics have

stories.title_zh: 2026年度「中国股权投资行业投资机构」系列名册正式发布
stories.title_en: 2026年度「中国股权投资行业投资机构」系列名册正式发布
stories.desc_zh: Alpha will be made, not found。 麦肯锡在2026年初发布的全球私募市场报告中给出了一个精准的判断。Alpha（超额收益）不再是找到的，而是做出来的。持续走低的利率、不断膨胀的估值倍数、唾手可得的廉价融资，这些放大利润的旧杠杆们，在过去十年间逐一消失。以至于，全球封闭式PE募资在2025年同比下滑17%，亚太地区的跌幅接近一半。 中国市场的故事更加复杂。钱的源头变了，美元基金退潮之后，国资和产业资本接过了定价权，也接过了游戏规则的书写权。退出的通道也变了，PPT里的“多元化退出策略”，变成了真实发生的交易（至少是一部分GP不得不学会的新手艺）。 与此同时，主线变了。一级市场关于人工智能的叙事，已悄然完成了一次逻辑的更替。 2025年，仅具身智能一个方向就吸纳了超过656亿元融资，涌入了近千家公司。更长期看，硬科技在VC投资中的占比五年内从38%攀升至62%。毫无
stories.desc_en: Alpha will be made, not found. McKinsey gave a precise judgment in its Global Private Markets report released in early 2026. Alpha is no longer found, it is made. Consistently low interest rates, ballooning valuation multiples, and easy access to cheap financing, the old levers that amplified profits have disappeared one by one over the past decade. As a result, global closed-end PE fundraising de

stories.title_zh: Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash
stories.title_en: Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash
stories.desc_zh: 该公司在一篇博客文章中表示： “我们的目的是提供一个有用的创意工具，并让人们控制他们的公共内容是否可以以这种方式被引用。” “我们听到有人反馈说这个功能没有达到目标，所以它不再可用。”
stories.desc_en: "Our intent was to provide a useful creative tool and to give people control over whether their public content could be referenced in this way," the company said in a blog post. "We've heard the feedback that this feature missed the mark, so it's no longer available."

stories.title_zh: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft
stories.title_en: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft
stories.desc_zh: 苹果公司声称，该不当行为是由OpenAI的高级领导层指导的，其中包括一名长期前员工。
stories.desc_en: Apple alleges the misconduct was directed by OpenAI's senior leadership, including a longtime former employee.

stories.title_zh: Open source AI matters more than ever, according to Hugging Face’s Clem Delangue
stories.title_en: Open source AI matters more than ever, according to Hugging Face’s Clem Delangue
stories.desc_zh: Hugging Face首席执行官Clem Delangue表示，开源人工智能正在蓬勃发展。近年来，该公司已经发展成为类似于人工智能的GitHub ，人工智能开发人员可以共享和下载开放模型和数据集，现在大约有一半的财富500强企业都在使用这些模型和数据集。Delangue已经看到同样的故事一次又一次地发生：公司开始[…]
stories.desc_en: Open source AI is booming, according to Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue. The company has grown into something like a GitHub for AI in recent years, where AI builders can share and download open models and datasets, now used by roughly half the Fortune 500. Delangue has seen the same story play out again and again: companies start […]

stories.title_en: SK Hynix raises $26.5B in the biggest foreign IPO in US history, is urged to build new US fabs
stories.desc_zh: 人工智能芯片热潮刚刚创造了华尔街迄今为止最大的时刻。现在， SK海力士和三星被要求在美国建造工厂。
stories.desc_en: The AI chip boom just produced its biggest Wall Street moment yet. Now SK Hynix and Samsung are being asked to build U.S. factories.

stories.title_zh: 市场发行热度大幅升温，熊猫债存量规模首超5000亿元
stories.title_en: 市场发行热度大幅升温，熊猫债存量规模首超5000亿元
stories.desc_zh: 今年以来，熊猫债发行热度显著上升。Wind数据显示，截至7月9日，以缴款截止日为统计口径，年内熊猫债发行规模已突破1700亿元，同比增长超七成；市场存量规模首次迈上5000亿元。与此同时，熊猫债发行主体结构持续优化，境外主权机构、跨国龙头企业、多边开发机构纷纷入场，为市场发展注入新动能。受访业内人士表示，熊猫债市场发行火热，主要受益于中美利差倒挂、人民币融资成本优势突出、人民币汇率趋稳等因素。熊猫债市场规模稳步扩张，将有助于推动人民币从贸易结算货币向国际投融资货币转型，持续提升人民币在全球资本市场的话语权，也是我国推进金融高水平对外开放的成果。（证券时报）
stories.desc_en: Since the beginning of this year, the heat of issuing panda bonds has increased significantly. Wind data shows that as of July 9, with the payment deadline as the statistical caliber, the issuance scale of panda bonds has exceeded 170 billion yuan in the year, an increase of more than 70% year-on-year; the market stock has reached 500 billion yuan for the first time. At the same time, the structure of the issuing entity of panda bonds continued to be optimized, and overseas sovereign institutions, multinational leading enterprises, and multilateral development institutions have entered the market to inject new momentum into market development. According to the interviewed industry insiders, the hot issue in the panda bond market was mainly due to factors such as the inverted spread between China and the United States, the prominent advantage of RMB financing costs, and the stabilization of the RMB exchange rate. The steady expansion of the size of the panda bond market will help promote the transformation of the RMB from a trade settlement currency to an international investment and financing currency, and continue to enhance the RMB's voice in the global capital market. It is also the result of China's promotion of high-level financial opening up. (Securities Times)

stories.title_zh: SK海力士考虑“内存即服务”模式，或允许客户租赁而非购买芯片
stories.title_en: SK海力士考虑“内存即服务”模式，或允许客户租赁而非购买芯片
stories.desc_zh: SK海力士正在考虑以新的方式销售其内存芯片的使用权，包括所谓的“内存即服务”，这意味着客户可以向这家韩国公司租用存储资源，而无需购买芯片。“我们实际上可以提供其他商业模式，”SK集团会长崔泰源在接受彭博电视采访时表示。“我们可以成为存储服务提供商，提供‘内存即服务’。未来，这实际上是我们可以关注的另一个领域。”（财联社）
stories.desc_en: SK Hynix is considering new ways to sell the use of its memory chips, including so-called “memory-as-a-service,” which means customers can lease storage resources from the South Korean company without having to buy the chips. “We can actually offer other business models,” Cui Taiyuan, chairman of SK Group, said in an interview with Bloomberg Television. “We can be a storage service provider, offering ‘memory as a service’. In the future, this is actually another area that we can focus on." (Finance Association)

stories.title_zh: 马斯克据悉要求特斯拉员工转向使用Grok
stories.title_en: 马斯克据悉要求特斯拉员工转向使用Grok
stories.desc_zh: 据报道，马斯克在一份备忘录中告知特斯拉员工，鉴于Grok 4.5的Token成本低于竞争对手，员工们应“尽可能”切换到Grok。他还要求工程师直接通过电子邮件向他反馈有关该模型的信息。（界面）
stories.desc_en: Musk reportedly told Tesla employees in a memo that employees should switch to Grok “as much as possible” given that Grok 4.5's token costs less than competitors. He also asked the engineer to feed back information about the model directly to him via email. (Interface)

stories.title_zh: OpenAI安全系统负责人据悉将离职
stories.title_en: OpenAI安全系统负责人据悉将离职
stories.desc_zh: 据报道，在OpenAI重组之际，该公司安全系统负责人Johannes Heidecke本周告知员工其将离职。此次重组旨在整合OpenAI的安全团队和研究团队。备忘录显示，OpenAI首席研究官Mark Chen表示，安全团队将向公司研究副总裁兼整合负责人Mia Glaese汇报工作，后者将兼任研究与安全副总裁。此前领导 OpenAI安全团队的Saachi Jain将成为公司临时安全系统负责人，向Glaese汇报工作。（界面）
stories.desc_en: Johannes Heidecke, the company's head of security systems, reportedly informed employees this week of his departure amid the restructuring of OpenAI. The reorganization aims to integrate OpenAI's security and research teams. Mark Chen, OpenAI's chief research officer, said the security team will report to Mia Glaese, the company's vice president of research and head of integration, who will also serve as vice president of research and security, according to the memo. Saachi Jain, who previously led the OpenAI security team, will become the head of the company's temporary security system, reporting to Glaese. (Interface)

stories.title_zh: 六氟磷酸锂需求旺盛，行业盈利能力显著提升
stories.title_en: 六氟磷酸锂需求旺盛，行业盈利能力显著提升
stories.desc_zh: 需求拉动下，2026年国内六氟磷酸锂市场结束前期生产亏损状态，价格一度冲破16万元/吨。虽然上半年市场价格总体呈现冲高回落状态，但行业企业盈利水平已显著提升。近日，天赐材料、多氟多等多家上市公司业绩预喜。对于六氟磷酸锂未来的市场供需格局，当前市场给予看多预期。（证券时报）
stories.desc_en: Driven by demand, the domestic lithium hexafluorophosphate market ended in 2026 with a production loss, and the price once exceeded 160,000 yuan/ton. Although market prices generally showed a downward trend in the first half of the year, the profitability of industry companies has increased significantly. Recently, a number of listed companies such as Tianci Materials and Dorfuoduo have previewed their performance. For the future market supply and demand pattern of lithium hexafluorophosphate, the current market is expected to be bullish. (Securities Times)

stories.title_zh: Omnia Partners names 10 new suppliers joining is Opus platform
stories.title_en: Omnia Partners names 10 new suppliers joining is Opus platform
stories.desc_zh: 随着Omnia Partners宣布其Opus采购平台的10个新参与者，企业对企业（ B2B ）电子商务门户网站获得了新一波供应商。Omnia在全国范围内作为合作采购组织运营，据该公司称，该公司已将Opus扩展到包括800多万个SKU。新的供应商包括IT解决方案提供商SHI ， […] POST Omnia P
stories.desc_en: A business-to-business (B2B) ecommerce portal gained a new wave of suppliers, as Omnia Partners announced 10 new participants for its Opus platform for procurement. Omnia, which operates nationally as a cooperative purchasing organization, has expanded Opus to include more than 8 million SKUs, according to the company. The new suppliers include IT solutions provider SHI, […] The post Omnia P

stories.title_zh: Home Depot expands delivery for overseas military families
stories.title_en: Home Depot expands delivery for overseas military families
stories.desc_zh: 家得宝表示，它正在扩大其交付合作伙伴关系，以覆盖海外军事社区。家得宝表示，截至7月8日，其与军事交易所的合作伙伴关系已扩大到包括向陆军邮局（ APO ）、舰队邮局（ FPO ）和外交邮局（ DPO ）地址发货。在这样做的过程中，零售商及其合作伙伴将提供[…]家得宝后扩展DELIV
stories.desc_en: The Home Depot said it’s expanding its delivery partnership to reach overseas military communities. As of July 8, its partnership with military exchanges expanded to include delivery to Army Post Office (APO), Fleet Post Office (FPO) and Diplomatic Post Office (DPO) addresses, Home Depot said. In doing so, the retailer and its partners will provide […] The post Home Depot expands deliv

stories.title_zh: Levi Strauss ecommerce sales jump 19% as DTC strategy boosts Q2 growth
stories.title_en: Levi Strauss ecommerce sales jump 19% as DTC strategy boosts Q2 growth
stories.desc_zh: 由于Levi Strauss & Co.继续投资其直接面向消费者(DTC)业务，其第二财季的电子商务收入和整体销售额有所增长。截至5月31日的季度， Levi Strauss报告净收入为15.6亿美元，同比增长8.0%。在线收入是Levi Strauss的DTC渠道的一部分， […] Levi Strauss后的电子商务销售额作为DT增长了19 ％
stories.desc_en: Levi Strauss & Co. grew ecommerce revenue and overall sales in its fiscal second quarter, as the retailer continued to invest in its direct-to-consumer (DTC) business. For the quarter ended May 31, Levi Strauss reported net revenue of $1.56 billion, up 8.0% year over year. Online revenue, which is part of Levi Strauss’ DTC channel, […] The post Levi Strauss ecommerce sales jump 19% as DT
